CEDAR WAVE HOLDINGS

Building with purpose, leading from within

"The safest place for ships is in the harbor, but that's not why ships were built." — Anonymous

Who I Am

For over two decades, I've been building, leading, and navigating the decisions that shape organizations and the people inside them. My career has taken me from the financial sector to the founding team of one of the country's most recognized consumer brands, but the through-line has always been the same: seeking to live a fully integrated, fruitful life while helping others do the same.

I joined Simple Modern in 2016 as part of the founding team. Over the next nine years, I helped build the company from startup to nearly $200 million in revenue — fully bootstrapped — becoming one of the world's leading drinkware brands. I built our B2B Custom business from the ground up, then led People and Culture through a transformative stretch: +200% growth in both headcount and revenue, while the company became widely recognized for its values-based approach.

When the business reached a new level of maturity in late 2025, I stepped out of the Chief Culture Officer role and took a three-month sabbatical to rest and reflect. This time was life changing for me and my family, gave me fresh perspective, and led to my decision to exit the day to day operations of Simple Modern in order to build what's next.

Before Simple Modern, I spent years in the financial sector, most notably at RiskMetrics Group, a leader in risk management software for the investment community. I experienced the full business lifecycle there: VC funding, IPO, and eventual acquisition by MSCI for $1.6 billion. Those years taught me how companies evolve and what it takes to scale with integrity.

What I've Learned

The success at Simple Modern was tangible. But the real reward was learning how to value what matters in the midst of it — how to steward faith, family, and friendships — and leading others to do the same. I've spent countless hours wrestling through the tensions of growth, scale, and achievement while staying rooted in what is true, and discovering more about myself along the way. I am still on the journey.

What I Do Now

Through Cedar Wave Holdings, I maintain my minority interest in Simple Modern, pursue active and passive business interests in emerging opportunities, and provide confidential counsel to a small number of senior leaders navigating the intersection of business, calling, and character through an exclusive advisory practice. Each of these serves a unique purpose in my pursuit to live a fully integrated life while leading from within.

I live in the Oklahoma City area with my wife and two kids. You'll find me running or outdoors, cheering on the Sooners and OKC Thunder, writing, building community, and thinking about how to experience more deeply the friendship and love of Jesus.

The Name

For me, cedar represents my Lebanese heritage. Lebanon — a beautiful country marked by both resilience and hardship — is known for its ancient cedar trees, long revered for their strength, durability, and beauty. In Scripture, they appear as symbols of righteousness and abundance.

Wave comes from my wife's story. She spent her childhood summers at her grandparents' beach house in New Jersey — a place that helped shape her sense of identity and purpose. It gave her a deep love for the ocean — the surfing, the sand, and even the power of the water.

Like most stories, ours carry both beauty and challenge. Individually and together, those experiences have shaped who we are.

While we each have our own professional paths, we are learning to embrace vocation as something that flows from our marriage. Cedar Wave Holdings is a reflection of that pursuit — a desire to live and build with intentionality, marked by the strength, beauty, joy, and adventure of the cedars and the waves.

Contact

Cedar Wave Holdings provides confidential counsel to a select number of senior leaders navigating the intersection of business, calling, and character.

If you're interested in exploring a potential relationship or have inquiries about business opportunities, I'd welcome a conversation.

Email: jon@cedarwaveholdings.com

I typically respond within 48 hours.
